name: ACTEOS S.A.
summary: ACTEOS S.A. designs, develops, integrates, and provides software and related services in the field of supply chain management in France, Germany, Lebanon, and internationally. It offers Acteos suite, which include forecasting and procurement system for point of sales/e-business/distribution centers; transportation management system to organize and manage transport activities; and warehouse management system, a modular solution to manage customers' warehouses. The company also provides software as a service, hotline, technical project management, and consulting services. ACTEOS S.A. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Roubaix, France.
